query: SELECT pontoId, categoria, item, COUNT(*) as count FROM necessidades GROUP BY pontoId, categoria, item HAVING count > 1 ORDER BY count DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bbquj4Y6sTJTAT.root --database bY2zkmax4x7K9B5D6rJvxB --execute SELECT pontoId, categoria, item, COUNT(*) as count FROM necessidades GROUP BY pontoId, categoria, item HAVING count > 1 ORDER BY count DESC;
